title: Totem Panda
description: This resource pack replaces the regular totem with a panda!
body:
## ****"3D TotemPanda"**** is a resource pack that replaces the immortality totem with a 3D panda

> ###     What does it change?
>
> - Replaces the texture of the immortality totem with a 3D panda model.
> - Supports all versions starting from 1.11

> ###       Important
>
> - This resource pack is not compatible with the [Small Totem Pop](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/small-totem-pop/), [Small Totem Pops](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/small-totem-pops/), [Small Totem Render](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/small-totem-render/), [Small Totem Overlay](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/small-totem-overlay/), [small totem pop1](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/small-totem-pop1). resource pack (model conflict)

> ## Using totem on version 1.11
> ![using totem on version 1.11](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b43f392306c863e0d73280f0e1e23c54b008b7f4.png)


> ## Using totem on version 1.21.8
> ![ using totem on version 1.21.8](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8e0a59831afdb8b1cfe86a4a67804bedd7587d34.png)
